---
title: "Welcome"
about:
  template: jolla # 这是一个非常漂亮的个人简介模板
  image: profile.jpg # 请在文件夹里放一张你的照片，命名为 profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your_email@edu.com
---

## About Me

我是南开大学的一名学生, 对低维拓扑和量子拓扑感兴趣
I am a graduate student in Mathematics at [Your University], interested in **Low-Dimensional Topology** and **Quantum Topology**.

My current research focuses on 3-manifold invariants arising from non-semisimple tensor categories. I am particularly interested in the connections between:

* Turaev-Viro type invariants
* Kuperberg invariants (and their relation to Reidemeister torsion)
* Skein modules

## Recent Updates

* **Dec 2025**: Started reading Costantino-Geer-Patureau-Mirand's paper on non-unimodular categories.
* **Oct 2025**: Attended the *Workshop on Quantum Topology*.
